title: Prevent Original WorkForm Submission Links from Persisting on Duplicated Items or Boards
excerpt: When duplicating items or boards that contain WorkForm submission links, the duplicated items should not retain a submission link to the original item, since the link is uniquely tied to the source

posts.author: Sjtate (Simon)
posts.cookedHtml: When duplicating items or boards that contain WorkForm submission links, the duplicated items should not retain a submission link to the original item, since the link is uniquely tied to the source
